sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Eustathius</hi> Episcopus Thessalonicensis [Eust.] <date TEIform="date">xii A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Commentarii ad Homeri Iliadem et Odysseam, ad fidem exempli Romani [editi</title_>], 7 vols., Leipzig 1825-30. See also Dionysius Periegeta.</item>
